---
title: "Working Papers"
#description-meta: "Current research and papers under review"
#page-layout: full
#back-to-top-navigation: true
title-block-banner: false
#css: custom.css
bibliography: working.bib
csl: apsr-reverse.csl
nocite: '@*' # <-- Add this line to cite everything
---


<!--Include academic icons or buttons-->
{{< include /files/includes/_academic.qmd >}}

<!-- Notes: Papers listed here are in various stages of development, from under review to early drafts. -->

::: {#refs}
:::

<!-- ## Working Papers -->

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  const refsDiv = document.getElementById('refs');
  if (refsDiv) {
    let html = refsDiv.innerHTML;

    // Replace PDF URL markers with visible links (Pandoc may auto-link the URL inside)
    html = html.replace(/\[PDF-URL:(?:<a [^>]+>)?((https?:\/\/)[^<\]]+)(?:<\/a>)?\]/g,
      '<a href="$1" class="pdf-link" target="_blank">[PDF]</a>');

    // Replace abstract markers with collapsible toggles
    html = html.replace(/\[ABSTRACT-START\](.*?)\[ABSTRACT-END\]/gs,
      '<div class="abstract-toggle"><span class="abstract-button">▶ Abstract</span><div class="abstract-content" style="display:none;">$1</div></div>');

    refsDiv.innerHTML = html;

    document.querySelectorAll('.abstract-button').forEach(button => {
      button.addEventListener('click', function() {
        const content = this.nextElementSibling;
        const isOpen = content.style.display !== 'none';
        content.style.display = isOpen ? 'none' : 'block';
        this.innerHTML = isOpen ? '▶ Abstract' : '▼ Abstract';
      });
    });
  }
});
</script>
